description: Hero instances — single clean isolated object, neutral background. Feeds the programmatic compositor. Each image becomes one alpha cutout via rembg and is composited at varied counts with ground truth by construction.
style_prefix: product photograph, single object, centered in frame, studio lighting, sharp focus, plain neutral white background, no shadow, no props, no text
negative: multiple objects, pair, duplicate, text, watermark, logo, signature, cluttered background, busy, pattern, tile, people, hands, arms
generation_notes: One object per image. rembg is used post-generation to strip the background — SDXL's 'white background' is never perfectly white, so rembg handles the matte.

subjects.prompt: one single closed brown corrugated cardboard shipping box, perfectly centered in frame, three-quarter angle so top and one side visible, sharp focus, plain white seamless studio backdrop, soft even studio lighting
one single white ceramic coffee mug, handle facing right, perfectly centered in frame, sharp focus, plain white seamless studio backdrop, soft even studio lighting
one single green apple with a short stem, perfectly centered in frame, sharp focus, plain white seamless studio backdrop, soft even studio lighting
